global.description: The ad features a clean and modern design with a teal background and bold text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to book travel accommodations easily.

elements.label: Teal background
elements.description: A solid teal background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: RouteBloon
elements.description: Bold, large black text at the top of the ad, prominently displaying the brand name.

elements.label: Dream destinations await
elements.description: Medium-sized white text centered in the ad, conveying an inviting message.

elements.label: Hotels + flights in one tap
elements.description: Smaller white text below the main message, providing additional information.

elements.label: Book now
elements.description: A prominent white button with bold text at the bottom, encouraging immediate action.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small teal circle positioned near the top left, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Small oval
elements.description: A small oval shape in a lighter shade of teal, located in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Square shape
elements.description: A square shape in a contrasting color, positioned in the center-right area.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Text at the bottom of the ad that summarizes the offer, encouraging engagement.
elements.text_content: destinations await Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: RouteBloon logo
elements.description: The logo of RouteBloon, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dream
elements.description: A small piece of text that adds to the overall message, located in the center.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A smaller button with the text 'Book now' encouraging users to take action.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, followed by the main message and additional text in the center, with the CTA at the bottom.
